arts.sum: Diogo Jota could help Arne Slot reduce the burden on Mohamed Salah in front of goal and provide the team with a boost in Premier League title race.

arts.ttl: Why Andy Robertson will not be suspended for Liverpool's Premier League clash with Tottenham
arts.sum: Andy Robertson saw red against Fulham for hauling down Harry Wilson - but the fine details of Premier League rules means he is able to face Tottenham.

Liverpool are aiming to progress into the semi-finals of the Carabao Cup when they take on a manager-less Southampton at St. Mary's on Wednesday night. With Liverpool's midfield stars poised to be preserved for Sunday's trip to Tottenham, Endo will likely start at St. Mary's.

arts.ttl: Rodrigo Bentancur seven-game ban appeal verdict: Can Tottenham midfielder play against Man United, Liverpool?
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur's appeal to reduce the seven-match ban imposed on midfielder Rodrigo Bentancur is dismissed by the Football Association.
